languages.text: {n}Полковник, обычно похожий на хищного зверя, не скалится, не улыбается в предвкушении крови, не смотрит на вас с ненавистью. Он предельно собран, а взгляд его холоден и расчетлив.{/n} "Искупление для одного, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Для вас или для меня".

{n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник, обычно похожий на хищного зверя, не скалится, не улыбается в предвкушении крови, не смотрит на вас с ненавистью. Он предельно собран, а взгляд его холоден и расчетлив.{/n} "Искупление для одного, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Для вас или для меня".

traits.locale_text: {n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bear his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

{n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

{n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bear his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "I'm sorry it's come to this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bear his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

{n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

{n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

languages.text: {n}普段は捕食者のように見える大佐は、血に飢えた期待に歯を剥いたり、微笑んだり、憎悪の眼差しを向けることもない。冷酷で計算に富んだ視線で、君をじっと見つめるだけだ。{/n}「残念だな、陛下」
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bear his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "I'm sorry it's come to this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: 普段は捕食者のように見える大佐は、血に飢えた期待に歯を剥いたり、微笑んだり、憎悪の眼差しを向けることもない。冷酷で計算に富んだ視線で、君をじっと見つめるだけだ。

languages.text: {n}Le colonel, qui ressemble habituellement à un prédateur, ne montre pas les dents. Vous ne voyez ni sourire carnassier sur son visage ni haine dans ses yeux. Il est totalement concentré, le regard froid et calculateur.{/n} « Expiation pour un seul, {mf|héritier|héritière}. Mais s'agira-t-il de vous, ou de moi ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel, qui ressemble habituellement à un prédateur, ne montre pas les dents. Vous ne voyez ni sourire carnassier sur son visage ni haine dans ses yeux. Il est totalement concentré, le regard froid et calculateur.{/n} « Expiation pour un seul, {mf|héritier|héritière}. Mais s'agira-t-il de vous, ou de moi ? »

languages.text: {n}Normalde yırtıcı bir hayvanı andıran albay, ne dişlerini gösteriyor ne de kana susamış bir beklentiyle gülümsüyor. Sana nefretle de bakmıyor. Bütünüyle odaklanmış, bakışları soğuk ve hesaplı.{/n} "Sona kalana kefaret {mf|lord|leydi} vâris. Artık hangimiz kalırsa."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Normalde yırtıcı bir hayvanı andıran albay, ne dişlerini gösteriyor ne de kana susamış bir beklentiyle gülümsüyor. Sana nefretle de bakmıyor. Bütünüyle odaklanmış, bakışları soğuk ve hesaplı.{/n} "Sona kalana kefaret {mf|lord|leydi} vâris. Artık hangimiz kalırsa."

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel, der sonst stets wie ein Raubtier wirkt, fletscht weder seine Zähne, noch lächelt er mit blutrünstiger Vorfreude. Auch sein Blick ist keineswegs hasserfüllt. Er ist vollkommen konzentriert, seine Miene kalt und berechnend.{/n} "Sühne für den Einzelnen, {mf|Lord Erbe|Lady Erbin}. Sei es für Euch oder für mich."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel, der sonst stets wie ein Raubtier wirkt, fletscht weder seine Zähne, noch lächelt er mit blutrünstiger Vorfreude. Auch sein Blick ist keineswegs hasserfüllt. Er ist vollkommen konzentriert, seine Miene kalt und berechnend.{/n} "Sühne für den Einzelnen, {mf|Lord Erbe|Lady Erbin}. Sei es für Euch oder für mich."

languages.text: {n}El coronel, con aspecto de depredador en cualquier otro momento, no enseña los dientes ni sonríe con expectación sanguinaria, ni tampoco te mira con odio. Está totalmente concentrado y no aparta de ti su mirada fría y calculadora.{/n} «Expiación para el último, {mf|lord|lady} hereder{mf|o|a}, sea usted o sea yo».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel, con aspecto de depredador en cualquier otro momento, no enseña los dientes ni sonríe con expectación sanguinaria, ni tampoco te mira con odio. Está totalmente concentrado y no aparta de ti su mirada fría y calculadora.{/n} «Expiación para el último, {mf|lord|lady} hereder{mf|o|a}, sea usted o sea yo».

languages.text: {n}这位平素样貌凶恶的上校，此刻既没有龇牙咧嘴，也没有露出嗜血的狞笑，更没有用仇恨的目光看着你。他全神贯注，目光冰冷审慎。{/n}“一人之赎，继承人大人。要么是您，要么是我。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."

traits.locale_text: {n}这位平素样貌凶恶的上校，此刻既没有龇牙咧嘴，也没有露出嗜血的狞笑，更没有用仇恨的目光看着你。他全神贯注，目光冰冷审慎。{/n}“一人之赎，继承人大人。要么是您，要么是我。”
